The Punisher (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $33,664,370Details
International Box Office $20,869,404
Worldwide Box Office $54,533,774
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$13,834,527 (41.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.43 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:61.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$33,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,649 opening theaters/2,649 max. theaters, 3.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $61,311,431

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 16th, 2004 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: June 3rd, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: September 7th, 2004 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for pervasive brutal violence, language and brief nudity.
Running Time: 124 minutes
Franchise: Punisher
Plot point: Closeted Homosexual, Crime, Crime Boss, Death of a Son or Daughter, Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, LGBTQ+, Revenge
Social setting: Organized Crime
Source material: Marvel Comics
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Lionsgate, Marvel Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
